name: HRT_FEEDBACK_SUGGESTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.SUGGESTION_ID SUGGESTION_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, B.SUGGESTION_SUPPLIER_CODE SUGGESTION_SUPPLIER_CODE, B.SUGGESTION_TYPE SUGGESTION_TYPE, B.STATUS_CODE STATUS_CODE, B.SUGGESTION_ASSOC SUGGESTION_ASSOC, B.SUGGESTION_ASSOC_KEY1 SUGGESTION_ASSOC_KEY1, B.SUGGESTION_ASSOC_KEY2 SUGGESTION_ASSOC_KEY2, B.SUGGESTION_SUPPLIER_ID SUGGESTION_SUPPLIER_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, TL.LANGUAGE LANGUAGE, TL.SUGGESTION_DESCR SUGGESTION_DESCR FROM HRT_FEEDBACK_SUGGESTIONS_B B, HRT_FEEDBACK_SUGGESTIONS_TL TL WHERE B.SUGGESTION_ID = TL.SUGGESTION_ID AND B.ENTERPRISE_ID = TL.ENTERPRISE_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
